subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of the horizons and Goal of every longing servant! These souls are precious through Thy grace and bounty, and these persons are among the sincere ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دلبر آفاق و ای معشوق هر بندهٴ مشتاق این نفوس به فضل و موهبتت نفیسند و این اشخاص از اهل اخلاص
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
